scenario.key_phrase: My friend told me to call, I'm not sure I'm ready

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Hello! This is Priya from PhysicsWallah. Am I speaking with Shruti?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Haan, yes... actually my friend told me to call, I'm not sure I'm ready

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: No worries at all! Your friend must have recommended PW for a good reason. Can you tell me which class you're currently in?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Class 11... but I don't know if I need coaching right now

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: That's perfectly fine to feel unsure! Class 11 is actually the perfect time to start. Are you preparing for JEE or NEET?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: NEET... but I'm just starting to think about it

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Great choice! NEET ki preparation early start karna bahut smart decision hai. You have good time - almost 19 months for NEET 2027. Are you currently taking any coaching?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: No, nothing yet. I'm still in school only

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Perfect! School ke saath-saath structured NEET preparation start karna will give you a huge advantage. Have you thought about what kind of budget you're comfortable with for coaching?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Actually... I don't know. How much does it cost? My parents haven't decided anything yet

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: I understand! Let me tell you about our NEET Yakeen 2027 batch - it's ₹33,999 for the complete course. But we have EMI options starting at just ₹3,299 per month through PW Pay. That's less than what most families spend on daily chai!

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: That sounds expensive... I need to ask my parents first

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Bilkul! It's important to discuss with parents. But think about it - ₹3,299 per month for complete NEET preparation with India's best teachers. Other coaching institutes charge 2-3 lakhs easily!

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Hmm... what exactly do we get in this course?

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Great question! You get complete syllabus coverage for Physics, Chemistry, Biology, live classes, recorded lectures, test series, doubt solving sessions, and personal mentorship. Everything you need for NEET success!

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Okay... but I'm still not sure if I'm ready to commit

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: I totally understand your hesitation. Tell me, what are your main concerns about starting NEET preparation right now?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: I don't know if I can manage school and coaching together... and the money thing

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: These are very valid concerns! Our course is designed keeping school students in mind. Classes are scheduled to not interfere with school, and recorded lectures mean you can study at your own pace. About money, we have 0% EMI - no extra charges!

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Can I think about it and call you back? I really need to talk to my parents

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Of course! Family discussion is very important. Can I call you back tomorrow evening after you've spoken with your parents? What would be a good time?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Maybe around 7 PM tomorrow? But I can't promise anything right now

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Perfect! I'll call you tomorrow at 7 PM. Take your time to discuss with your parents. Remember, starting early in Class 11 gives you the best chance for NEET success. Any other questions for now?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: No, I think that's all. I'll talk to my parents tonight

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Wonderful! I'll call you tomorrow at 7 PM then. Don't worry, we'll find the right solution for you. Have a great day, Shruti!

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Thank you, bye

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Bye! Take care!
